---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or architectural enhancement for Xulcan
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

# 🚀 Feature Overview

Describe the feature clearly and concisely.

---

# 🎯 Objective

What problem does this solve?

Why is this important for Xulcan?

---

# 🧠 Architectural Context

Which domains are impacted?

- [ ] manifest
- [ ] runtime
- [ ] kernel
- [ ] blueprint
- [ ] registry
- [ ] governance
- [ ] memory
- [ ] tools
- [ ] infrastructure
- [ ] API
- [ ] CLI

---

# 📍 Files Impacted

List affected files/modules.

Example:

- `xulcan/runtime/engine.py`
- `xulcan/system/assembler.py`

---

# 🛠 Technical Specifications

Describe:
- expected behavior
- contracts
- APIs
- schemas
- FSM transitions
- validation rules
- adapter behavior

Use code blocks whenever possible.

---

# ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature implemented
- [ ] Tests addedww
- [ ] Typing preserved
- [ ] Backwards compatibility evaluated
- [ ] Docs updated

---

# ⚠️ Constraints

List forbidden approaches or important architectural rules.

Example:
- Do NOT hardcode providers
- Do NOT bypass registries
- Do NOT inject business logic into kernel

---

# 📚 Additional Context

Add diagrams, references, notes, or related issues here.
